ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for splits and dividends */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount for the day */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient to adjust for stock splits */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock (e.g., sh.603156) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "market_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index record */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market index record */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the market index */,
  "adjusted_value" REAL /* Adjusted value of the index */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, option) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds and other instruments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "trading_volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading volume record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amounts" (
  "amount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amount record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the amount record */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount traded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amounts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnovers" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the turnover record */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Turnover value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnovers_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the security event */,
  "security_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the security event occurred */,
  "security_event" TEXT /* Type of security event (e.g., login failure, unauthorized access) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session identifier */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the security event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the system */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of the system */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage percentage */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage percentage */,
  "network_latency" REAL /* Network latency */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors during the metric period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)
